DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SIMPSON GUMPERTZ & HEGER, INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED, BUT THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE MOVING PAPERS PER SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PRO TEM JUDGE: ERNST HALPERIN, NOT REPORTED.

Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling.
Hearing For Right To Attach and Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is taken off calendar, judgment entered 5/23/12. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFFS GUMPERTZ & HEGER, INC.'S HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT will be heard at 9:30 am in Department 302 on Law and Motion line 20.

Notcie Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. There being no appearance the parties are deemed to have stipulated that the matter be heard by a judge pro tem. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SIMPSON GUMPERTZ & HEGER, INC.'s Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is Denied without prejudice. No opposition was filed, but the moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of proof of service of the moving papers per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, not reported.
